items.abstract_zh: 网络模拟器是网络运营商的必备工具，可以协助完成容量规划、拓扑设计和参数调整等重要任务。流行的模拟器都是基于离散事件模拟，它们的性能不随现代网络的规模而扩展。最近，基于深度学习的技术被引入来解决可扩展性问题，但是，正如我们通过实验表明的那样，它们的模拟结果可见性很差，并且无法推广到不同的场景。在这项工作中，我们将可扩展和广义的连续模拟技术与离散事件模拟相结合，以实现高可扩展性，同时提供数据包级可见性。我们从现代网络的可靠排队理论建模开始，仔细识别数学上难以处理或计算成本高昂的部分，然后仅使用深度神经网络（DNN）对其进行建模。我们的方法被称为 DeepQueueNet，结合了网络的先验知识，并支持任意拓扑和设备流量管理机制（给定足够的训练数据）。我们的大量实验表明，DeepQueueNet 在 GPU 数量方面实现了近线性加速，并且其对平均和第 99 个百分位数往返时间的估计精度在所有场景中都优于现有的基于 DNN 的端到端性能估计器。

items.title: NeuroScaler: neural video enhancement at scale.
items.abstract: High-definition live streaming has experienced tremendous growth. However, the video quality of live video is often limited by the streamer's uplink bandwidth. Recently, neural-enhanced live streaming has shown great promise in enhancing the video quality by running neural super-resolution at the ingest server. Despite its benefit, it is too expensive to be deployed at scale. To overcome the limitation, we present NeuroScaler, a framework that delivers efficient and scalable neural enhancement for live streams. First, to accelerate end-to-end neural enhancement, we propose novel algorithms that significantly reduce the overhead of video super-resolution, encoding, and GPU context switching. Second, to maximize the overall quality gain, we devise a resource scheduler that considers the unique characteristics of the neural-enhancing workload. Our evaluation on a public cloud shows NeuroScaler reduces the overall cost by 22.3× and 3.0--11.1× compared to the latest per-frame and selective neural-enhancing systems, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 高清直播经历了巨大的增长。然而，直播视频的视频质量往往受到流媒体上行带宽的限制。最近，神经增强直播在通过在摄取服务器上运行神经超分辨率来提高视频质量方面显示出了巨大的前景。尽管有它的好处，但大规模部署成本太高。为了克服这一限制，我们推出了 NeuroScaler，这是一个为直播流提供高效且可扩展的神经增强的框架。首先，为了加速端到端神经增强，我们提出了新颖的算法，可以显着减少视频超分辨率、编码和 GPU 上下文切换的开销。其次，为了最大限度地提高整体质量，我们设计了一个资源调度程序，该调度程序考虑了神经增强工作负载的独特特征。我们对公共云的评估表明，与最新的每帧和选择性神经增强系统相比，NeuroScaler 的总体成本分别降低了 22.3 倍和 3.0--11.1 倍。

items.title: Practical GAN-based synthetic IP header trace generation using NetShare.
items.abstract: We explore the feasibility of using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) to automatically learn generative models to generate synthetic packet- and flow header traces for networking tasks (e.g., telemetry, anomaly detection, provisioning). We identify key fidelity, scalability, and privacy challenges and tradeoffs in existing GAN-based approaches. By synthesizing domain-specific insights with recent advances in machine learning and privacy, we identify design choices to tackle these challenges. Building on these insights, we develop an end-to-end framework, NetShare. We evaluate NetShare on six diverse packet header traces and find that: (1) across all distributional metrics and traces, it achieves 46% more accuracy than baselines and (2) it meets users' requirements of downstream tasks in evaluating accuracy and rank ordering of candidate approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 我们探索使用生成对抗网络（GAN）自动学习生成模型来为网络任务（例如遥测、异常检测、配置）生成合成数据包和流标头跟踪的可行性。我们确定了现有基于 GAN 的方法中的关键保真度、可扩展性和隐私挑战以及权衡。通过将特定领域的见解与机器学习和隐私方面的最新进展相结合，我们确定了应对这些挑战的设计选择。基于这些见解，我们开发了一个端到端框架 NetShare。我们在六种不同的数据包标头跟踪上评估 NetShare，发现：(1) 在所有分布指标和跟踪中，它的准确度比基线高 46%；(2) 它满足下游任务在评估候选方法的准确度和排名顺序方面的用户要求。

items.title: Cebinae: scalable in-network fairness augmentation.
items.abstract: For public networks like the Internet and those of many clouds, end-host applications can use any congestion control protocol they wish. This protocol diversity and application autonomy are only increasing over time. While in-network support for fairness is an attractive solution for reigning in the inequity, existing solutions still have difficulty scaling to today's networks using today's devices. In this paper, we present Cebinae, a mechanism for augmenting existing networks of legacy hosts with penalties for flows that exceed their max-min fair share. Cebinae is compatible with all of the congestion control protocols in today's Internet, is deployable on commodity programmable switches, and scales orders of magnitude beyond existing alternatives.
items.abstract_zh: 对于像互联网和许多云这样的公共网络，终端主机应用程序可以使用它们希望的任何拥塞控制协议。随着时间的推移，这种协议的多样性和应用程序的自主性只会不断增加。虽然网络内对公平的支持是控制不平等的一个有吸引力的解决方案，但现有的解决方案仍然难以扩展到使用当今设备的当今网络。在本文中，我们提出了 Cebinae，一种增强传统主机现有网络的机制，对超过其最大-最小公平份额的流量进行惩罚。 Cebinae 与当今互联网中的所有拥塞控制协议兼容，可部署在商用可编程交换机上，其规模比现有替代方案高出几个数量级。

items.title: Understanding 5G performance for real-world services: a content provider's perspective.
items.abstract: 5G has seen rapid growth recently, attracting several measurement studies on its coverage, connectivity and quality of service. However, there is still a lack of understanding of 5G's capabilities and potential impacts from a content provider (CP)'s perspective. This paper fills in this gap by studying 5G networks used by over 23 million users in one year in Kuaishou, a popular crowdsourced live streaming platform. Our measurements provide the following discoveries. i) Standalone (SA) 5G generally provides end-to-end performance improvement as compared with 4G or non-SA (NSA) 5G, but its advantage depends on both the number of cellular users and CP-level configurations. ii) In the radio access network, SA 5G is more sensitive to access density but has better handover tolerance. iii) Controlled experiments with 29 mobile device models on energy consumption refute some "conventional wisdom," including that 5G always consumes more power. iv) Traceroute-based active experiments in over 300 cities show that although users are "closer" to the internet in SA 5G, their end-to-end latency may not benefit from that. Furthermore, we show new design space for 5G participants and provide a 5G-aware rebuffer strategy tested by 9 million viewers in Kuaishou, with a 7% reduction in rebuffer proportion.
items.abstract_zh: 5G 最近发展迅速，吸引了多项关于其覆盖范围、连接性和服务质量的测量研究。然而，从内容提供商 (CP) 的角度来看，人们仍然缺乏对 5G 功能和潜在影响的了解。本文通过研究流行的众包直播平台快手一年内超过 2300 万用户使用的 5G 网络来填补这一空白。我们的测量提供了以下发现。 i) 与 4G 或非 SA (NSA) 5G 相比，独立 (SA) 5G 通常可提供端到端性能提升，但其优势取决于蜂窝用户数量和 CP 级别配置。 ii) 在无线接入网络中，SA 5G对接入密度更敏感，但具有更好的切换容忍度。 iii) 对 29 种移动设备型号进行的能耗对照实验驳斥了一些“传统观点”，包括 5G 总是消耗更多电量。 iv) 在 300 多个城市进行的基于 Traceroute 的主动实验表明，尽管 SA 5G 中用户距离互联网“更近”，但他们的端到端延迟可能无法从中受益。此外，我们为5G参与者展示了新的设计空间，并提供了经过快手900万观众测试的5G感知rebuffer策略，rebuffer比例降低了7%。

items.title: Aequitas: admission control for performance-critical RPCs in datacenters.
items.abstract:
With the increasing popularity of disaggregated storage and microservice architectures, high fan-out and fan-in Remote Procedure Calls (RPCs) now generate most of the traffic in modern datacenters. While the network plays a crucial role in RPC performance, traditional traffic classification categories cannot sufficiently capture their importance due to wide variations in RPC characteristics. As a result, meeting service-level objectives (SLOs), especially for performance-critical ( PC ) RPCs, remains challenging.

We present Aequitas, a distributed sender-driven admission control scheme that uses commodity Weighted-Fair Queuing (WFQ) to guarantee RPC-level SLOs. In the presence of network overloads, it enforces cluster-wide RPC latency SLOs by limiting the amount of traffic admitted into any given QoS and downgrading the rest. We show analytically and empirically that this simple scheme works well. When the network demand spikes beyond provisioned capacity, Aequitas achieves a latency SLO that is 3.8× lower than the state-of-art congestion control at the 99.9 th -p and admits up to 2× more PC RPCs meeting SLO when compared with pFabric, Qjump, D 3 , PDQ, and Homa. Results in our fleetwide production deployment show a 10% latency improvement.
items.abstract_zh:
随着分解存储和微服务架构的日益普及，高扇出和扇入远程过程调用 (RPC) 现在产生了现代数据中心的大部分流量。虽然网络在 RPC 性能中起着至关重要的作用，但由于 RPC 特征的巨大差异，传统流量分类类别无法充分体现其重要性。因此，满足服务级别目标 (SLO)，尤其是性能关键 (PC) RPC，仍然具有挑战性。

我们提出了 Aequitas，这是一种分布式发送者驱动的准入控制方案，它使用商品加权公平队列 (WFQ) 来保证 RPC 级别的 SLO。在出现网络过载的情况下，它通过限制允许进入任何给定 QoS 的流量并降级其余流量来强制执行集群范围内的 RPC 延迟 SLO。我们通过分析和经验证明这个简单的方案效果很好。当网络需求激增超出预配置容量时，Aequitas 的延迟 SLO 比第 99.9 th-p 时最先进的拥塞控制低 3.8 倍，并且与 pFabric、Qjump、D 3 、PDQ 和 Homa 相比，允许满足 SLO 的 PC RPC 数量增加了 2 倍。我们整个车队生产部署的结果显示延迟改善了 10%。

items.title: Symbolic router execution.
items.abstract: Network verification often requires analyzing properties across different spaces (header space, failure space, or their product) under different failure models (deterministic and/or probabilistic). Existing verifiers efficiently cover the header or failure space, but not both, and efficiently reason about deterministic or probabilistic failures, but not both. Consequently, no single verifier can support all analyses that require different space coverage and failure models. This paper introduces Symbolic Router Execution (SRE), a general and scalable verification engine that supports various analyses. SRE symbolically executes the network model to discover what we call packet failure equivalence classes (PFECs), each of which characterises a unique forwarding behavior across the product space of headers and failures. SRE enables various optimizations during the symbolic execution, while remaining agnostic of the failure model, so it scales to the product space in a general way. By using BDDs to encode symbolic headers and failures, various analyses reduce to graph algorithms (e.g., shortest-path) on the BDDs. Our evaluation using real and synthetic topologies show SRE achieves better or comparable performance when checking reachability, mining specifications, etc. compared to state-of-the-art methods.
items.abstract_zh: 网络验证通常需要分析不同故障模型（确定性和/或概率性）下不同空间（标头空间、故障空间或其乘积）的属性。现有的验证器可以有效地覆盖标头或故障空间，但不能同时覆盖两者，并且可以有效地推理确定性或概率性故障，但不能同时推理两者。因此，没有一个验证器可以支持需要不同空间覆盖和故障模型的所有分析。本文介绍了符号路由器执行（SRE），这是一种支持各种分析的通用且可扩展的验证引擎。 SRE 象征性地执行网络模型来发现我们所说的数据包故障等价类 (PFEC)，每个类都描述了跨标头和故障的产品空间的独特转发行为。 SRE 在符号执行期间启用各种优化，同时保持与故障模型无关，因此它以通用方式扩展到产品空间。通过使用 BDD 对符号标头和故障进行编码，各种分析可简化为 BDD 上的图算法（例如，最短路径）。我们使用真实和合成拓扑进行的评估表明，与最先进的方法相比，SRE 在检查可达性、挖掘规范等时取得了更好或相当的性能。

items.title: LiteFlow: towards high-performance adaptive neural networks for kernel datapath.
items.abstract:
Adaptive neural networks (NN) have been used to optimize OS kernel datapath functions because they can achieve superior performance under changing environments. However, how to deploy these NNs remains a challenge. One approach is to deploy these adaptive NNs in the userspace. However, such userspace deployments suffer from either high cross-space communication overhead or low responsiveness, significantly compromising the function performance. On the other hand, pure kernel-space deployments also incur a large performance degradation because the computation logic of model tuning algorithm is typically complex, interfering with the performance of normal datapath execution.

This paper presents LiteFlow, a hybrid solution to build high-performance adaptive NNs for kernel datapath. At its core, LiteFlow decouples the control path of adaptive NNs into: (1) a kernel-space fast path for efficient model inference, and (2) a userspace slow path for effective model tuning. We have implemented LiteFlow with Linux kernel datapath and evaluated it with three popular datapath functions including congestion control, flow scheduling, and load balancing. Compared to prior works, LiteFlow achieves 44.4% better goodput for congestion control, and improves the completion time for long flows by 33.7% and 56.7% for flow scheduling and load balancing, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
自适应神经网络（NN）已被用于优化操作系统内核数据路径功能，因为它们可以在不断变化的环境下实现卓越的性能。然而，如何部署这些神经网络仍然是一个挑战。一种方法是在用户空间中部署这些自适应神经网络。然而，这种用户空间部署面临着高跨空间通信开销或低响应能力的问题，严重损害了功能性能。另一方面，纯内核空间部署也会导致性能大幅下降，因为模型调整算法的计算逻辑通常很复杂，会干扰正常数据路径执行的性能。

本文介绍了 LiteFlow，这是一种为内核数据路径构建高性能自适应神经网络的混合解决方案。 LiteFlow 的核心是将自适应神经网络的控制路径解耦为：（1）用于高效模型推理的内核空间快速路径，以及（2）用于有效模型调整的用户空间慢速路径。我们使用 Linux 内核数据路径实现了 LiteFlow，并使用三种流行的数据路径功能（包括拥塞控制、流调度和负载平衡）对其进行了评估。与之前的工作相比，LiteFlow 的拥塞控制吞吐量提高了 44.4%，流调度和负载均衡的长流完成时间分别提高了 33.7% 和 56.7%。

items.title: Multi-resource interleaving for deep learning training.
items.abstract:
Training Deep Learning (DL) model requires multiple resource types, including CPUs, GPUs, storage IO, and network IO. Advancements in DL have produced a wide spectrum of models that have diverse usage patterns on different resource types. Existing DL schedulers focus on only GPU allocation, while missing the opportunity of packing jobs along multiple resource types.

We present Muri, a multi-resource cluster scheduler for DL workloads. Muri exploits multi-resource interleaving of DL training jobs to achieve high resource utilization and reduce job completion time (JCT). DL jobs have a unique staged, iterative computation pattern. In contrast to multi-resource schedulers for big data workloads that pack jobs in the space dimension, Muri leverages this unique pattern to interleave jobs on the same set of resources in the time dimension. Muri adapts Blossom algorithm to find the perfect grouping plan for single-GPU jobs with two resource types, and generalizes the algorithm to handle multi-GPU jobs with more than two types. We build a prototype of Muri and integrate it with PyTorch. Experiments on a cluster with 64 GPUs demonstrate that Muri improves the average JCT by up to 3.6× and the makespan by up to 1.6× over existing DL schedulers.
items.abstract_zh:
训练深度学习（DL）模型需要多种资源类型，包括CPU、GPU、存储IO和网络IO。深度学习的进步产生了各种各样的模型，这些模型对不同的资源类型具有不同的使用模式。现有的深度学习调度程序仅关注 GPU 分配，而错过了将作业打包到多种资源类型的机会。

我们推出了 Muri，一种用于深度学习工作负载的多资源集群调度程序。 Muri 利用 DL 训练作业的多资源交错来实现高资源利用率并减少作业完成时间 (JCT)。深度学习作业具有独特的分阶段迭代计算模式。与在空间维度打包作业的​​大数据工作负载的多资源调度程序相比，Muri 利用这种独特的模式在时间维度的同一组资源上交错作业。 Muri 采用 Blossom 算法为具有两种资源类型的单 GPU 作业找到完美的分组计划，并将该算法推广到处理具有两种以上类型的多 GPU 作业。我们构建了 Muri 的原型并将其与 PyTorch 集成。在具有 64 个 GPU 的集群上进行的实验表明，与现有的深度学习调度器相比，Muri 将平均 JCT 提高了 3.6 倍，将完工时间提高了 1.6 倍。

items.title: SEED: a SIM-based solution to 5G failures.
items.abstract: Failures in 5G mobile networks are becoming the norm with the ongoing global rollout. If left unattended, they affect mobile user experiences and the proper functioning of applications. In this work, we describe SEED, which offers a novel SIM-based solution to 5G failure diagnosis and handling. SEED infers failure causes by exploiting current standardized 5G error codes and decision-tree/online learning algorithms. It further takes corresponding multi-tier reset/redo actions (reset protocol operations, refresh outdated configurations, reload profiles, etc.) once the failure cause is inferred. SEED takes the operator's perspective in its design for fast deployment. SEED design works within the 5G standard framework and does not require changes on the device firmware or infrastructure hardware. Our evaluation has confirmed the viability of SEED.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 5G 移动网络的不断推出，故障正在成为常态。如果无人看管，它们会影响移动用户体验和应用程序的正常运行。在这项工作中，我们描述了 SEED，它为 5G 故障诊断和处理提供了一种基于 SIM 的新颖解决方案。 SEED 通过利用当前标准化 5G 错误代码和决策树/在线学习算法来推断故障原因。一旦推断出故障原因，它就会进一步采取相应的多层重置/重做操作（重置协议操作、刷新过时的配置、重新加载配置文件等）。 SEED 在设计中从运营商的角度出发，以实现快速部署。 SEED 设计在 5G 标准框架内工作，不需要更改设备固件或基础设施硬件。我们的评估证实了 SEED 的可行性。

items.title: FlyMon: enabling on-the-fly task reconfiguration for network measurement.
items.abstract: Network measurement is important to data center operators. Most existing efforts focus on developing new implementation schemes for measurement tasks. Little attention is paid to on-the-fly task reconfiguration. Due to resource constraints, it is impossible to configure all needed tasks at start-up and dynamically turn on/of them. To support real-time reconfiguration of many different tasks, a key observation is that it is unnecessary to bind a task and its implementation at the compilation phase. We design FlyMon, the first sketch-based measurement system that can make on-the-fly reconfigurations on a large set of measurement tasks. FlyMon introduces the concept of Composable Measurement Units (CMUs), which are general operation units that support reconfigurable implementation for measurement tasks combined from different flow keys and flow attributes. FlyMon maps the design of CMUs to programmable switches' data planes so that the number of compacted CMUs can be maximized. FlyMon also provides dynamic memory management. We prototype FlyMon on Tofino and currently enable four frequently used flow attributes. Each CMU Group (with 3 CMUs) can concurrently perform up to 96 isolated measurement tasks with less than 8.3% hardware resources. The tasks can be deployed with configurable memory size at the millisecond level. By cross-stacking, FlyMon can deploy up to 27 CMUs in one pipeline of Tofino.
items.abstract_zh: 网络测量对于数据中心运营商来说非常重要。大多数现有的工作重点是为测量任务开发新的实施方案。很少有人关注即时任务重新配置。由于资源限制，不可能在启动时配置所有需要的任务并动态地打开/关闭它们。为了支持许多不同任务的实时重新配置，一个关键的观察是没有必要在编译阶段绑定任务及其实现。我们设计了 FlyMon，这是第一个基于草图的测量系统，可以对大量测量任务进行动态重新配置。 FlyMon引入了可组合测量单元（CMU）的概念，CMU是通用操作单元，支持由不同流键和流属性组合而成的测量任务的可重构实现。 FlyMon 将 CMU 的设计映射到可编程交换机的数据平面，以便最大限度地提高紧凑型 CMU 的数量。 FlyMon还提供动态内存管理。我们在 Tofino 上对 FlyMon 进行原型设计，目前启用了四种常用的流属性。每个 CMU 组（包含 3 个 CMU）可以同时执行多达 96 个独立的测量任务，且硬件资源占用率低于 8.3%。可以使用毫秒级别的可配置内存大小来部署任务。通过交叉堆叠，FlyMon 可以在 Tofino 的一条管道中部署多达 27 个 CMU。

items.title: Meissa: scalable network testing for programmable data planes.
items.abstract: Ensuring the correctness of programmable data planes is important. Testing offers comprehensive correctness checking, including detecting both code bugs and non-code bugs. However, scalability is a key challenge for testing production-scale data planes to achieve high coverage. This paper presents Meissa, a scalable network testing system for programmable data planes with full path coverage. The core of Meissa is a domain-specific code summary technique that simplifies the control flow graph of a data plane program for scalable testing without sacrificing coverage. Code summary decomposes a data plane program into individual pipelines, and summarizes each pipeline with a succinct representation. We formally prove that Meissa with code summary achieves 100% path coverage . We use both open-source and production-scale data plane programs to evaluate Meissa. The evaluation shows that ( i ) Meissa is able to test production-scale data plane programs that cannot be supported by state-of-the-art efforts, and (ii) besides P4 code bugs, Meissa is able to not only identify known non-code bugs, but also detect previously-unknown non-code bugs. We also share in this paper several real cases tested by Meissa in a production programmable data plane.
items.abstract_zh: 确保可编程数据平面的正确性非常重要。测试提供全面的正确性检查，包括检测代码错误和非代码错误。然而，可扩展性是测试生产规模数据平面以实现高覆盖率的关键挑战。本文介绍了 Meissa，这是一种用于具有全路径覆盖的可编程数据平面的可扩展网络测试系统。 Meissa 的核心是一种特定于域的代码摘要技术，可简化数据平面程序的控制流图，以在不牺牲覆盖范围的情况下进行可扩展测试。代码摘要将数据平面程序分解为单独的管道，并用简洁的表示总结每个管道。我们正式证明带有代码摘要的 Meissa 实现了 100% 的路径覆盖率。我们使用开源和生产规模的数据平面程序来评估 Meissa。评估表明，(i)Meissa 能够测试最先进的技术无法支持的生产规模数据平面程序，(ii)除了 P4 代码错误之外，Meissa 不仅能够识别已知的非代码错误，还能够检测以前未知的非代码错误。我们还在本文中分享了 Meissa 在生产可编程数据平面中测试的几个真实案例。

items.title: SIGCOMM '22: ACM SIGCOMM 2022 Conference, Amsterdam, The Netherlands, August 22 - 26, 2022
items.abstract:
It is our great pleasure to welcome you to SIGCOMM 2022, the flagship conference of the ACM Special Interest Group on Data Communications! It is of particular pleasure for us to greet you in person, in the lovely city of Amsterdam!

As we all know well, "it's all about networking". And, even at this time and age, when it comes to human networking, nothing comes close to personal interactions. We are thus particularly excited to hold SIGCOMM 2022 as the first in-person instantiation of the conference after two virtual editions.
items.abstract_zh:
我们非常高兴欢迎您参加 SIGCOMM 2022，这是 ACM 数据通信特别兴趣小组的旗舰会议！我们非常高兴在可爱的阿姆斯特丹市亲自向您致意！

众所周知，“一切都与网络有关”。而且，即使在这个时代，当谈到人际关系时，没有什么比个人互动更重要了。因此，我们非常高兴能够举办 SIGCOMM 2022，这是继两届虚拟会议之后的首次现场会议。
